title: The New Klondike

actors: Thomas Meighan, Lila Lee, Paul Kelly
plot: Tom Kelly, a small-town baseball pitcher, is sent to a minor-league team in Florida, and fails to make the team. He starts dabbling in real estate, in the midst of the Florida land boom (in which a lot of the land sold was under w...
